mapper.select: SELECT GREATEST(SUM(COALESCE(attend_days, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(late_times, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(early_leave_times, 0)), 0) as normal, SUM(COALESCE(late_times, 0)) as late, SUM(COALESCE(early_leave_times, 0)) as earlyLeave, SUM(COALESCE(absent_days, 0)) as absent, SUM(COALESCE(leave_days, 0)) as `leave` FROM t_attendance_record WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth}
